product: Change to use_case field in VPC endpoint API responses
tagline: In an upcoming release, the use case field in the VPC endpoint CRUD response JSON will change from WORKSPACE ACCESS to GENERAL ACCESS.
what_it_does: In an upcoming release, the use case field in the VPC endpoint CRUD response JSON will change from WORKSPACE ACCESS to GENERAL ACCESS. This change should not impact most customers. This article describes how to manage VPC endpoint registrations in the account console.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: In an upcoming release, the use case field in the VPC endpoint CRUD response JSON will change from WORKSPACE ACCESS to GENERAL ACCESS.
